TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy_Dennis_Bell, title = Dennis_Bell, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Sakizaya]}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/wiki/Dennis_Bell} }

S.FORM: Dennis Bell nalecuhan i Cincinnati, Ohio, nanu syubay kanas-mali miunduay nu Amilika NBA nisakaput, pahanhanan tu kawaw ayza. Dennis Bell i 1973 a mihcan NBA sapapili' mimaliay a kawaw, saka 5 ku uwac atu silsil 83, namapili' tu nu New York Knicks putiput. 6 bulad 2 demiad, 1951 a mihca, Dennis Bell, miunduay.
S.PHON: d…ônnis b…ôr~…ær~…æ nar~…æ…ô ¶uƒßan i ¶in ¶innati, oƒßio, nanu sjubaj kanas-mar~…æi miunduaj nu amir~…æika nba nisakaput, paƒßanƒßanan tu kawaw ajza. d…ônnis b…ôr~…ær~…æ i **** a miƒß ¶an nba sapapir~…æi î~ ° mimar~…æiaj a kawaw, saka * ku uwa ¶ atu sir~…æsir~…æ **, namapir~…æi î~ ° tu nu n…ôw jork kni ¶ks putiput. * bur~…æad * d…ômiad, **** a miƒß ¶a, d…ônnis b…ôr~…ær~…æ, miunduaj.
S.FORM: Dennis Bell nalecuhan i Cincinnati, Ohio, nanu syubay kanas-mali miunduay nu Amilika NBA nisakaput, pahanhanan tu kawaw ayza. Dennis Bell i 1973 a mihcan NBA sapapili' mimaliay a kawaw, saka 5 ku uwac atu silsil 83, namapili' tu nu New York Knicks putiput. 6 bulad 2 demiad, 1951 a mihca, Dennis Bell, miunduay.
